name: Gradient stop editor
description: Adds an advanced gradient editor to the fill and stroke colour choosers in the vector costume editor.

info.text: Open the fill or stroke colour picker on a gradient shape to reveal a live axis widget drawn directly over the shape on the canvas
Click a stop handle to pick its colour; drag it to reposition it; click anywhere on the axis to add a new stop
Double-click a stop or drag it off the axis to delete it
